message:
docs(readme): add Homebrew package manager installation option

Add alternative installation method via Homebrew tap for macOS/Linux
users who prefer managed installs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch: @@ -15,6 +15,12 @@ curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_sca | bash -s -- ``` +**Or via Homebrew (macOS/Linux):** + +```bash +brew install dicklesworthstone/tap/ubs +``` + ---
